items.title: 浴室闪光过曝自拍
items.description: 镜子被闪光打白一半，像临时测试镜头，却把松弛感经营得过于完整。
items.prompt: realistic lo-fi phone snapshot in a small apartment bathroom mirror, adult woman late 20s fully dressed in a plain oversized zip hoodie and loose jeans, direct phone flash blowing out half the mirror, yellow apartment light, slightly dirty mirror spots, damp sink edge, crooked towel, ordinary domestic bathroom, intentionally bad composition, mild blur and grain, tired but calm expression, documentary editorial realism, strictly non-glamorous, no logos, no watermark, no readable text, adult subject only

items.title: 电梯反光裁坏一角
items.description: 金属门反光里人脸被切掉一块，像失手，实则每个细节都像算过。
items.prompt: realistic lo-fi elevator reflection phone photo at night, adult woman fully dressed in a dark jacket over a plain crewneck shirt, face partially cropped by brushed metal elevator door reflection, phone held low, harsh residential building light, slight motion blur, low-resolution front camera feel, candid but calculated ordinary styling, yellow-gray color cast, documentary editorial realism, strictly non-glamorous, no logos, no watermark, no readable text, adult subject only

items.title: 车窗油膜里的半张脸
items.description: 车窗反光和油膜把脸糊得不够清楚，反而更像会刷到的情绪照片。
items.prompt: night car window reflection phone photo, realistic editorial snapshot, adult woman late 20s in a simple jacket seated in the back seat, half her face blurred by smeared window reflections and city bokeh, low-light noise, slightly dirty glass, intentionally degraded iPhone image quality, melancholy but ordinary mood, documentary realism, strictly non-glamorous, no logos, no watermark, no readable text, adult subject only

items.title: 卧室前摄塌肩一拍
items.description: 前摄像头把肩线和房间一起拍得松垮，像没准备，却很会。
items.prompt: front camera bedroom snapshot with intentionally weak composition, realistic lo-fi iPhone look, adult woman around 30 fully dressed in a sweatshirt and relaxed pants, sitting on the edge of an unmade bed, warm dim lamp, open wardrobe, charging cable on floor, casual slouched posture, slight fisheye distortion from front camera, imperfect framing and blur, ordinary apartment mood, documentary realism, strictly non-glamorous, no logos, no watermark, no readable text, adult subject only

items.title: 走廊鱼眼对焦失败
items.description: 门口走廊像监控抓拍，主角甚至没完全合焦，却很像小红书爆款封面。
items.prompt: realistic hallway phone photo with fisheye misfocus aesthetic, adult woman in a loose coat standing in an apartment corridor near her door, face slightly out of focus while background light blooms harshly, keys and tote bag in hand, cool fluorescent overhead lights, low resolution, grain, awkward authenticity that still feels carefully styled, documentary realism, strictly non-glamorous, no logos, no watermark, no readable text, adult subject only

items.title: 厨房台面后的收尾自拍
items.description: 凌晨厨房里靠着台面最后补一张，疲惫、失焦、微黄，却像整组里最贵的一张废片。
items.prompt: late-night kitchen counter phone snapshot, realistic documentary editorial style, adult woman around 30 fully dressed in a plain sweater leaning against a small apartment kitchen counter after a long day, warm yellow overhead bulb, disposable cup, fruit peel, dish rack, slight lens smear, image softly out of focus, low-resolution casual front-camera feel, composed exhaustion, deliberately bad-photo aesthetics, strictly non-glamorous, no logos, no watermark, no readable text, adult subject only
